name: MoneyGram
description_short: Indianapolis, IN has a 24-hour MoneyGram location at 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr offering money transfers and check cashing services.
description_long:
MoneyGram's East Fall Creek location in Indianapolis, IN is a standalone money services hub at 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr, open 24 hours daily. This around-the-clock facility serves Indianapolis residents and visitors with reliable check-cashing and money transfer services, operating every day of the week without interruption.

At this Indianapolis location, MoneyGram provides domestic and international money transfers, check cashing, and bill payment services. Contact them at 317-614-4046 to confirm specific transaction types, discuss fees, or get help with your financial needs at any hour.

If you're an Indianapolis, IN resident requiring reliable check cashing or money transfers outside standard banking hours, this 24-hour MoneyGram branch accommodates night shifts and urgent financial needs. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your payment method to complete any transaction.
address: 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr, Indianapolis, IN 46226

company_info.headquarters: 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr, Indianapolis, IN 46226

pros: 63+ locations in Indianapolis alone, including convenient retail partners like CVS and Ace Cash Express
Extended hours at many locations (some open until 11:30 PM), providing after-hours access to cash services
Both online and offline transaction options for flexibility in how customers send/receive money
International money transfer capability alongside domestic transfers
Minimal friction—customers can walk into nearby retail locations without appointment
Partnership with established retail chains improves brand recognition and accessibility
cons: Website does not display fee structures, making cost comparison difficult for consumers
No specific APR or rate information provided—pricing opacity is a significant limitation
Limited service details on the location search page; cannot determine exact fees before visiting
Faces intense competition from cheaper digital alternatives and traditional bank wire transfers
Agent-based model creates inconsistent customer service quality across locations
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates sending remittances to family internationally
Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing cash access without a bank account
People requiring same-day or quick money transfers to domestic recipients
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and international remitters who prioritize physical location convenience over competitive pricing. The critical caveat is that fee structures are not transparent on their website, requiring customers to contact locations or visit in person to understand true costs—making price comparison difficult before committing to a transfer.
services: Agent network access through retail partners
meta_description: MoneyGram at 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr, Indianapolis, IN. 24-hour check cashing and money transfers.
